name: AMERICAN FINANCIAL GROUP INC
summary: American Financial Group Inc (AFG) is an insurance holding company. Based on the 10-K filing excerpt provided, AFG operates in insurance and related financial services. The filing references premiums, revenues, reserves for asbestos, environmental pollution and mass tort claims, and investment activities, suggesting AFG underwrites specialty insurance products. Specific product lines and operational details are contained in sections not fully provided in this excerpt.

products.name: Specialty Insurance
products.description: Insurance products including coverage related to asbestos, environmental pollution, and mass tort claims.
